folio.label: 197r
folio.l: Of sapience , and for hire thewes clere
Or ellis lo , this maydenes name brigút
Of heuene and leos , cometú , for whicú by rigút
Men mygúte hire wel , the heuene of peeple calle
Ensample of goode , and wyse werkes alle
¢ For leos peeple , in englissú is to seye

note.notetxt: 106Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: And rigút as men moun~ , in the heuene se
The Sonne & Moone , and sterres euäy weye
Rigút so , men goostly , in this mayden free
Seyen of feitú , the magnanymytee
And eke the clernesse , hol of sapience
And sondry werkes , brigúte of excellence
¢ And rigút so , as theise philosophres wryte

note.notetxt: 113Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: That heuene is swift , & round , & eke bre~nynge
Rigút so was faire Cecile , the white
Ful swift & bysy , euäe in good werkynge
And round and hool , in good ¹seuerynge
And brennyng euäe , in Charite ful brigúte
Now haue I ©ow declared , what she higúte
¢ This mayden brigút , Cecile , as hire lif seitú

note.notetxt: 120Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Was come of Romayns , & of noble kynde
And from hire Cradel , vp fostred in the feitú
Of Crist , and bar his gospel in hire mynde
She neuere cessed , as I wryten fynde
Of hire preyere , and god to loue & drede
Bysekynge hi~ to kepe , hire maydenhede
¢ And whan this mayden shulde , vn to a man

note.notetxt: 127Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: I wedded be , that was ful ©onge of age
Whicú æ I cleped was , valerian
And day was comen , of hire mariage
She ful deuout and humble , in hire corage
Vnder hire robe of gold , æ sat ful faire
Had next hire flessú , I clad hire in an hayre
¢ And whil æ the Orgenes , maden melodye

note.notetxt: 134Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: To god allone , in hire herte thus song she
O lord my soule , and eke my body gye
Vnwemmed , lest æ I confounded be
And for his loue , æ deyde vp on the tree
Euäy secunde , & thridde day she faste
Ay biddyng , in hire orisouns ful faste
¢ The nygút cam , & to bedde must she goon

note.notetxt: 141Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: W hire housbonde , as ofte is the manere
And pryuely , to hi~ , she seide a noon
